name: VWAP StdDev Band Touch
description: Enter when price touches/crosses VWAP standard deviation band and reverses. Mean reversion entry.

name: VWAP + RSI Pullback
description: RSI(3) oversold/overbought with VWAP directional filter and EMA trend confirmation.

name: EMA/VWAP Crossover
description: Enter when EMA crosses above/below VWAP with trend confirmation.

name: VWAP Reclaim + Pullback Hold
description: Enter when price reclaims VWAP, pulls back to hold it, with EMA stack (5/8/13) confirmation.

name: VWAP Band + OBV-RSI Dual Confirmation
description: Enter when price at VWAP band extreme AND OBV-RSI at oversold/overbought. Dual confirmation.

name: RSI Calculated on VWAP Source
description: RSI where source is VWAP instead of close price. Different signal timing than standard RSI.

name: Opening Range Breakout (Classic)
description: Enter when price closes above/below opening range high/low.

name: ORB Breakout with Retest Confirmation
description: Full candle outside OR + optional pullback retest before entry. Reduces false breakouts.

name: ORB + Triple Filter (VWAP/Volume/Candle)
description: ORB breakout gated by VWAP slope, volume threshold, and candle strength (close in top/bottom 30%).

name: Liquidity Sweep Reversal
description: Detect stop hunt at swing high/low (wick beyond, close inside), enter reversal.

name: FVG Mitigation Depth Entry
description: Detect Fair Value Gap, enter when price penetrates FVG box to configurable mitigation depth.

name: Session Sweep → Bias → Pullback
description: Wait for session range high/low sweep to determine bias, enter on pullback retracement.

name: Cumulative Gap Momentum
description: Cumulative gap series (like OBV but for open gaps) with SMA signal line. Long when rising.

name: Laddered/Pyramid Entry
description: Scale into position at multiple price levels to improve average entry price.

name: Trendline Breakout
description: Detect swing-based trendline and enter on confirmed breakout with volume.

name: Market Profile Open Drive
description: Market-profile-inspired open drive detection from cash market open. 5-bar breakout threshold.

name: Candle Pattern Confirmation
description: Enter on bullish/bearish candle patterns (hammer, engulfing, momentum) as confirmation layer.
